case_title: CARPENTER RIGGING & SUPPLY COMPANY, INC. VS SHASTA HARDWARE & SUPPLIES CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARPENTER RIGGING & SUPPLY COMPANY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHASTA HARDWARE & SUPPLIES CO., INC. $328.57 PRINCIPAL, $68.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $397.07 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $328.57 FILED BY CARPENTER RIGGING & SUPPLY COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SHASTA HARDWARE & SUPPLIES CO., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
